APIShark

Workspace

Collections

Collections are stored in ./collections.json.

Environment

Use {{VAR_NAME}} in URL, headers, and body.

Import with cURL

Postman-style HTTP request builder with SSE support.

Headers

Disabled rows stay editable but won’t be sent.

JSON preview

Response

Status: -

SSE mode: each incoming line is clickable to inspect payload and view JSON.

SSE lines

Click a line to inspect payload. 


                

              


              

                
                  JSON tools appear automatically when the final response body is valid JSON.
                
                

                  
                  
                

              

              

              

            


            

              

                Long aggregated output is capped to keep the page responsive.
